title: Mythic Metals Emissive Ores
description: Just a resource pack to give the ores in Mythic Metals glow.
body:
Adds emissive glow to the ores added by Mythic Metals.


    -Continuity is required

    -Sodium is recommended (if using sodium then Indium is required)


Thanks Noaaan for permission to upload and for the great mod. Check gallery for screenshot of permission.
